label: fresh_island_select_paused
note: Fresh Blitzkrieg Easy smoke start; paused at island-select intro after setup and initial dialogue delay.

label: archive_intro_paused
note: Archive selected with menu_continue+island_archive+island_archive+pause; 3s timer delta from first pause to CEO intro pause.

label: archive_map_ready_paused
note: Cleared Archive CEO intro via menu_continue+bottom_continue+pause; map is ready under pause menu.

label: archive_recommend_no_bridge_paused
note: recommend_mission --pause-map-peek failed to get bridge island_map and cost 12s from 0:16 to 0:28; UI classifier saw island_map.

label: after_first_mission_panel_paused
note: After first mission, segment stopped on reward/panel clear stall; manual bottom_continue+pause left another Continue panel behind pause. Start-map 0:28 to here 3:30 = 182s.

label: archive_map_after_mission1_paused
note: Reward panel finally cleared using reward_continue plus a 1s settle before pause; bottom_continue raced/stalled. Need build panel-clear settle/retry.

label: archive_after_mission2_map_paused
note: After second mission and full panel chain finally cleared. Mission2 route/deploy/combat began around 3:43/4:28; panel chain included Region Secured, Pod Recovered open-door, Pod contents Continue, and repeated classifier mislabels. Two missions completed by 10:51.

label: archive_after_mission2_actually_paused
note: Corrected final rest state: prior map was live/hovering gear, not paused. Manual gear click parked the map at 11:31; extra 40s leak came from pod/promotion panel recovery and missed pause confirmation.

label: fresh_archive_selected
note: Fresh Lightning War smoke: Archive selected, CEO intro underneath pause menu

label: after_mission1_paused_bottom_fix
note: After mission 1: manual Region Secured clear exposed bottom_continue y calibration miss; patched bottom_continue to y=653 while paused

label: after_mission2_paused
note: Mission 2 complete. Patched bottom_continue cleared Region Secured/continue chain automatically; segment stopped only because visible map + stale deployment bridge state.

label: after_mission3_paused_research_contaminated
note: Mission 3 complete but timing contaminated by RockThrown research gate and combat-screen classifier false positive; post-gate combat leg 82.17s, panel clear one step, route picker now reports Mission_Armored_Train region 5.

label: after_mission4_train_paused
note: Mission 4 Armored Train complete. Start-to-start train sample about 2:31 in-game from 0:10:18/21 to 0:12:49; combat wall 108.14s, panel chain 5 safe clicks, HQ now visible.

label: archive_complete_paused_after_reward_manual
note: Archive complete smoke. Final island time includes manual Perfect Island recovery: HQ combat 111.03s, classifier clicked wrong controls for Perfect Island dialogue/reward choice; manual panel_continue then +2 grid reward, paused at spend/leave screen.

label: ui_tail_post_archive_spend_leave_pauseable
note: UI-tail audit: post-island Spend Reputation / Leave Island screen is pauseable, but if left unpaused the timer keeps running. Need conductor to auto-pause immediately after Perfect Island reward selection and before shop/leave decisions.

label: ui_tail_island_select_pauseable
note: UI-tail audit: island-select/corporation preview is pauseable. After Leave Island, conductor should immediately pause before choosing next island; user/agent can plan from paused corp preview.

label: ui_tail_rst_intro_pauseable
note: UI-tail audit: clicking R.S.T. from island select commits and lands on CEO intro/dialogue. The intro is pauseable; menu_continue+island_rst+pause cost about 2 seconds from 0:25:34 to 0:25:36.

label: ui_tail_rst_map_pauseable_after_intro_clear
note: UI-tail audit: CEO intro bottom_continue lands on R.S.T. island map, and map is pauseable. menu_continue+bottom_continue+pause cost about 2 seconds from 0:25:36 to 0:25:38.

label: ui_tail_rst_map_fast_peek_cost
note: UI-tail audit: unpause screenshot peek of R.S.T. island map is possible but cost about 5 seconds (0:25:38 -> 0:25:43). Visible red regions: Sierra Quadrant, Strafe Zone Beta, Hardin Point. Need screenshot/save-based route helper to avoid repeated live peeks.

label: ui_tail_mission_preview_pauseable_strafe
note: UI-tail audit: first mission preview/detailed region panel is pauseable. Exposing Strafe Zone Beta preview and pausing cost 10 seconds (0:25:43 -> 0:25:53). It has Seismic Activity, Knock Mites, Protect Power Generator; route helper should avoid this slow/risky mission in real attempts when possible.

label: ui_tail_preview_dialogue_dismiss_did_not_start
note: UI-tail audit: menu_continue+dialogue_textbox+mission_preview_board+pause did NOT enter deployment for Strafe Zone Beta; after dismissing CEO text, the calibrated mission_preview_board click was insufficient. Need route helper to repeat the region/board click after dialogue dismissal.

label: ui_tail_deployment_not_pauseable
note: UI-tail audit: deployment screen did not enter pause when the calibrated pause button was clicked. Deployment must be treated as non-pauseable live-clock; conductor should deploy immediately with no deliberation or screenshots once deployment is visible.

label: ui_tail_region_secured_panel_before_pause_test
note: R.S.T. Mission_Crack ended on Region Secured reward panel after first audit mission; testing whether this panel can enter pause before Continue.

label: ui_tail_region_secured_panel_pauseable
note: Clicking top-left pause from Region Secured reward panel opened the pause menu. In real runs, pause must happen immediately on panel arrival; documenting first cost live timer.

label: ui_tail_region_secured_continue_to_map_pause
note: From pause on Region Secured panel, menu_continue -> reward_continue -> pause landed back in pause menu over island map. Tail cost about 2s when executed as a burst.

label: ui_tail_promotion_modal_pauseable_after_region_secured
note: After continuing Region Secured, a pilot promotion modal appears before true map control. The modal is pauseable; fast peek showed promotion_panel under the pause overlay.

label: ui_tail_promotion_clear_to_map_pause
note: From pause over promotion modal, menu_continue -> modal_understood -> pause reached true island map pause. Burst cost about 2s.

label: ui_tail_combat_safety_block_paused
note: Fox Plateau/Mission_Wind route start plus deployment/combat reached a SAFETY_BLOCKED_RE_SOLVE on turn 4. lightning_segment clicked pause after stopping, confirming blocker handoff can preserve pause-rest state.

label: fresh_smoke_island_select_paused
note: Fresh Blitzkrieg Easy Lightning War smoke after commit/push; paused at initial island-select state before choosing first island.

label: fresh_smoke_archive_intro_paused
note: Fresh smoke: Archive selected and paused on CEO intro after menu_continue,island_archive,pause burst.

label: fresh_smoke_archive_map_paused
note: Fresh smoke: clear_intro_pause landed on Archive map and re-paused; ready for first route decision.

label: fresh_smoke_mission1_region_secured_panel_stuck
note: Fresh smoke mission 1 complete. Segment got stuck clearing Region Secured because classifier chose perfect_island_panel/panel_continue despite reward_panel score being stronger; manual pause now parked over Region Secured.

label: fresh_smoke_after_mission1_route_helper_left_live
note: recommend_mission --pause-map-peek failed NO_ISLAND_MAP and left the Archive map live; lightning_peek then reported not_in_pause_menu/island_map. Manual pause recovered at 0:06:15. Need pause-restore verification around map peeks.

label: fresh_smoke_pause_map_peek_escape_did_not_resume
note: Verified pause-map-peek no longer leaks live map, but its resume step used Escape and captured the pause overlay instead of the live Archive map. Need Continue-button resume plus live-map verification before screenshot/read.

label: fresh_smoke_mission2_after_route_start
note: After selecting The Library via visual map routing; checking whether route_start escaped pause and reached deployment or burned UI time.

label: fresh_smoke_mission2_paused_after_region_secured
note: Mission 2 completed at Region Secured around 0:10:35, but lightning_segment produced no output and had to be killed after terminal UI was visible. region_secured_to_pause returned to pause by 0:10:45. Need diagnose silent/hung segment tail; UI burst itself is fast once invoked.

label: fresh_smoke_mission3_after_route_start
note: After selecting Old Town via visual map routing; route_start reached deployment/mission transition check before combat segment.

label: fresh_smoke_mission3_paused_after_segment_wait_stall
note: Mission 3 completed on Satellite at visible Region Secured around 0:14:27. lightning_segment still hung until killed, so visible-terminal check in lightning_loop is too late; cmd_auto_turn/wait path needs terminal-panel polling while waiting for combat_player.
